label: Content & Features
sample_reviews: ['Nothing good available in English, mostly Korean or teenage romance and sex content, very disappointed. The watch list should be at the top and not bottom.', "The mobile app has almost become unusable, for some reason it mixes profile settings in terms of watch history and parental settings. Just bizzare for a company of this size. The quality of new content has decreased drastically over the past couple of years also. it's search functionality is wors than any other app I use. Shame.", 'It is possible that you are one of the best OTT platforms. You have a great collection of movies and shows, and yes, I agree with that. But for the past one month, I have been seeing the same movies and shows in my feed. The same 10–12 titles keep appearing again and again. I have even memorised their names now. Very few new titles are shown to me. How am I supposed to discover new content? In the Drama genre, I see the same titles. In Sci-Fi as well, the same titles appear everywhere. Where is', 'For such a big company with billions in annual revenues, I would have expected a better app. AI recommendations are usually not very good. I wish I could disable in-app games or whole categories of films and series that do not interest me (e.g. horror). It feels like we are force-fed unwanted content, which does not make for a very positive user experience.', 'Content is tired, cliche, uncreative under AI slop. In the odd rare chance of a great movie, they have encrapified so severely that users will go months paying for an odd co-dependent expectation for another when they can just one time rent on Amazon or Itunes. Netflix is not the future, it is so 2015. If Netflix ceased to exist, half of users quickly find a lazy replacement, the other half, find a revelatory liberation.', 'I hate the last update. Is a copy on others apps max for example. Not easy to search the movies or series.', "There's no good shows/series or good movies, they should come up with better shows/series and movies, otherwise, Netflix is going down. Now there is always gay/lesbian content or only female main characters.", "it obvious that this app is top notch, just that there aren't enough latest movies. there was a time a movie was uploaded as latest whereas have watched the movie years back.... Please make an amendments to that....PEACE OUT✌️❤️", 'I was using Netflix but there are many movies I search but not inside Netflix..', "I love Netflix but I wonder please enlighten me, why is BON APPETIT YOUR MAJESTY is not on your app anymore? I have search high and low and it was supposed to have new episode this Sunday September 07, 2025 but there's none on your list...please return it", 'Most of the English movies on Imdb is not available on Netflix.']
